title: Extra Select Premium Floating Swan and Duck Feed, 5 Litre
features: Excellent supplement for all Ducks, Swans, Waterfowl, Cranes and Softbills.
Feed as a maintenance and breeding diet.
High levels of fish meal and shrimp as a replacement for the natural diet.
Customer may receive the box of 1.9kg variant/2.0kg 1.9kg variant
description: From the manufacturer Extra Select - Swan & Duck Food What is Extra Select Swan & Duck Food? Extra Select Swan & Duck Food is a specialized feed, designed to meet the nutritional needs of waterfowl. These floating pellets provide a balanced diet for swans, ducks, and geese, ensuring they receive all the necessary nutrients for a healthy life. Ideal for year-round feeding, it's a great way to nurture these beautiful birds. Why Waterfowl Love It Swans, ducks, and other waterfowl love Extra Select Swan & Duck Food for its natural taste and ease of eating. The floating pellets make it fun for them to feed, ensuring they enjoy every bite while getting the nutrition they need. Feeding Facts Feed at different spots to avoid overcrowding and ensure all get a share. Avoid overfeeding; a little goes a long way in maintaining their natural diet. Use specifically designed feeds like pellets instead of bread or junk food. Better than Sliced Bread Bread lacks the essential nutrients waterfowl need and can lead to health problems. It also pollutes water bodies, affecting the ecosystem. Nutritional Balance This feed is a perfect blend of proteins, fats, and fibers, ensuring a balanced diet for waterfowl, supporting their health. Fantastic Family Fun Feeding waterfowl with these pellets turns into a fun activity, bringing families closer to nature and creating memorable moments.
